What We Do

Our Services

Every service done on-site, on your schedule, anywhere in the GTA.

🔑

Car Key Replacement

Lost, damaged, or stolen key? We cut and program a new key on-site for most makes and models. No tow required.

Most vehicles — same day
📡

Smart Key Programming

Push-to-start fobs and proximity keys programmed to your vehicle on the spot. All major makes supported.

On-site programming
💳

Transponder Chip Keys

We clone or program transponder chips for a fraction of the dealer price — cut and coded on-site.

Save vs. dealership
🏠

Condo & Building Fobs

Duplicate your condo access fob($10), garage remote ($40), or elevator key card — fast and affordable.

Ask about your building
➕

Spare Key Add-On

Get a spare cut and programmed today while we're already at your location. Best time to do it.

Add-on while we're there
🚗

All Makes & Models

Honda, Toyota, BMW, Ford, GM, Kia, Hyundai and more. If it has a key, we likely support it.

How It Works

Simple. Fast. Done.

Three steps and your key problem is solved — no tow truck, no waiting room.

01
📞

Call or Text

Tell us your year, make, model, and the issue. We give you a quote right away — no runaround.

02
🚗

We Come To You

We roll out to your location — home, work, parking lot, wherever. No tow needed.

03
✅

Key Made On-Site

Your key is cut and programmed right there. You drive away. That's it.

04
💰

Pay & Save

Pay a flat rate — no hidden fees, no dealer markup. Cash, card, tap, e-transfer all accepted.

Payments

Easy & Secure Payment

Multiple ways to pay — whatever works best for you. All payments are safe and secure.

💳

Credit / Debit Card

Visa, Mastercard, Amex — tap or insert. We bring a wireless card reader to every job.

Accepted On-Site
📱

Apple Pay / Google Pay

Tap to pay with your phone or watch. Fast, secure, contactless — no card needed.

Tap & Go
🏦

Interac e-Transfer

Send payment directly from your bank. Quick and fee-free for you. Email us at kobee.b@gmail.com.

Instant Transfer
💵

Cash

Good old-fashioned cash always works. We'll provide a receipt on request.

Always Accepted

🔒 All card payments processed securely via Stripe — industry-standard encryption. We never store your card information.

Key Tips & Info

Know Your Options

Fast answers to common key and fob questions across the GTA.

Car Keys

On-Site Car Key Replacement — No Tow Required

Lost your car keys and need a new set immediately? With our on-site service, we come to you — cutting and programming a new key right where you are. No tow, no dealership, no days of waiting.

📞 Call for a Quote →
Condo Fobs

Condo Fob Duplication Across Toronto & GTA

Need a condo fob copy? Our mobile service covers Toronto and surrounding areas. We arrive at your location equipped to duplicate most fobs swiftly — perfect for residents who need quick access without the wait.

💬 Text a Photo →
Smart Keys

Smart Key Programming for All Major Brands

We offer on-site smart key programming for all major vehicle brands. Our experts bring the latest technology to your doorstep, ensuring your smart key works seamlessly with your vehicle.

📞 Book Today →
Transponder Keys

Transponder Chip Programming — Done On-Site

Transponder keys require special skills to program. Our team handles this technology on-site, ensuring your key communicates correctly with your car without the dealer trip or the dealer bill.

📞 Get a Quote →
Emergency

Emergency Car Key Service — Available Now

Emergencies happen. When they do, you need a fast, reliable solution. Our emergency key service is available across the GTA — locked out late at night or need a replacement key urgently, we're just a call away.

🚨 Call Now →
Pricing

Transparent Pricing — No Dealer Surprises

With 6ix Keys, what you see is what you get. You receive a clear quote before we begin any work. Many people are surprised at how affordable our services are compared to dealerships.

💬 Get a Quote →
FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before calling.

Prices vary by make and model, but most replacements range from $150–$350 — compared to $400–$700 at the dealership. We give you a quote before we start. No surprises.
No. We come to you — home, office, parking lot, wherever the car is sitting. All equipment is mobile. No tow truck needed in most cases.
Honda, Toyota, Ford, GM, Chevrolet, BMW, Audi, Volkswagen, Hyundai, Kia, Mazda, Nissan, Lexus, Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep, Ram, and more. If you don't see your vehicle, just call — we likely still support it.
Yes! We duplicate most condo fobs, parking garage remotes, and access cards. Some newer buildings use encrypted fobs — text us a photo and we'll let you know right away.
Most jobs are same-day. We serve Vaughan, Woodbridge, Mississauga, Brampton, North York, Richmond Hill, and surrounding GTA areas. Call or text to get a time estimate.
We accept credit/debit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay, Google Pay, Interac e-Transfer, and cash. We bring a wireless reader to every job. All card payments are processed securely through Stripe.
Yes. We operate 7 days a week. Weekend and evening service available — call or text 289-946-3846 to confirm availability.
